notes: Wave 3 of STRATEGIC-INITIATIVES-SPEC: the belief record. A maintained model is only as good as its memory of what was believed when — this release gives every initiative book one. - The journal. Every revision — an edit, a gate resolution, an event — appends a journal entry: per-initiative field diffs (from → to), the event that drove the change, the stated reason, and the author. Venture-book migrations journal themselves too. - Immutable snapshots. Each revision freezes the entire book (initiatives + shared risks) as an append-only snapshot; earlier snapshots are byte-stable under later edit
